pages.raw_text:
The long blockade has been broken
at last. The first train on the North
ern Pacific to come through on time
since January arrived this morn
ing at 1880. 1t was train No. 6, which
left Tacoma at 4:45 yesterday and
arrived very nearly on schedule time.
No. 3, from the east. left at an early
hour this morning and will go
through to the coast without incident
in the way Of Instructions which
made the last few weeks so notable.


Assistant General Superintendent
II. A. Kennedy, who has been absent
from Spokane since Christmas eve
ming. returned this morning. Mr..
Kennedy shows tho effects of his Is
days and nights OF fighting snow and
rock slides and repairing broken
bridges. Mr.. Kennedy was determin-
ed to open his line to the coast and
is pleased tothink they gained so
much time over the Northern Pacific
construction gangs.


PHILADELPHIA, Pa, Jan. 12.-At
the annual meeting today of the
Western New York & Pennsylvania
railroad the stockholders acted favor
ably on the proposal of the directors
to lease the company to the Pennsyl-
Hania for n term of 20 years. The
road is already practically owned by
the Pennsylvania. having been oper-
ated heretofore as a part OF Its Buff
falo Il Allegheny Valley division.


President Mellen OF the Northern
Pacnic says there is little prospect
OF n reduction in passenger and
freight rates this year. While he
believes the business will be larger
than last year the company Is spend
ing a large amount in improvements.


The Canadian Pacific last year
earned $39.5Si,000, an increase over
the previous year of over $5.521. 900.
The Grand Trunk earned $3O.036,479.
and the Intercolonial. $6,655,463.
These are the largest earnings In the
history Of the Canadian roads.


The railroad commissioners of
Kentucky have gone to New York to
investigate the alleged violation of
Kentucky laws by the combination OF
railroad systems In the state.


All trains through were a few min
utes late this morning ana from this
on. If the weather continues cold.
these trains will be kept as near
schedule time as possible.
